series_metadata.series_description: Compliance documentation required by local school districts, community schools and non-public schools to submit calamity day plans and resolutions approving the plan passed by their board of education or governing authority, which is submitted to the Ohio Department of Education for the applicable school year. The calamity day plans require educators to use online lessons or “Blizzard Bags” to make up the number of hours equivalent to three (3) school days.
